method_summary: SWE-agent introduces a custom agent-computer interface (ACI) that enables language model agents to autonomously use computers to solve software engineering tasks by enhancing their ability to create/edit code files, navigate repositories, and execute tests and programs.
key_innovation: The custom agent-computer interface (ACI) that significantly enhances an agent's ability to interact with software engineering tasks.
title: SWE-agent: Agent-Computer Interfaces Enable Automated Software Engineering
